summary: Comprehensive testing of Agent Details page, Agent Downloads, and WebSocket features. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all pages loading correctly and key functionality working. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in command creation.
passed_tests: Agent Downloads - GET /api/agent/download/advanced-agent returns Python script with v4.0 WebSocket support
Agent Downloads - GET /api/agent/download/installer returns defender installer script
Agent Downloads - Content-Disposition headers set correctly for both downloads
Agent Commands - GET /api/agent-commands/agents/status returns registered agents
Agent Commands - GET /api/agent-commands/agents/connected returns connected agents
Agent Commands - GET /api/agent-commands/types returns 11 command types including Quick Actions
Agent Commands - GET /api/agent-commands/pending returns pending commands
Agent Commands - GET /api/agent-commands/history returns command history
Agent Commands - POST /api/agent-commands/create creates new command (fixed ObjectId bug)
Agent Commands - GET /api/agent-commands/agents/{agentId}/alerts returns agent alerts
Agent Commands - GET /api/agent-commands/agents/{agentId}/scan-results returns scan results
Agent Details Page - All required data available (hostname, OS, IP, version, heartbeat)
Agent Details Page - Quick Actions command types available (full_scan, collect_forensics, update_agent, restart_service)
Agents Page - GET /api/agents returns list of agents
Agents Page - GET /api/network/discovered-hosts returns discovered hosts

features: Download Agent dropdown with Advanced Agent and Defender Installer options
Stats cards: Registered Agents, Pending Approval, Total Commands, Command Types
Agents tab with Details button for each agent
System Information: OS, IP Address, Agent Version, Last Heartbeat, Last Scan
Quick Actions: Full Scan, Collect Forensics, Update Agent, Restart Service
Back button to Agent Commands page
Refresh and Run Full Scan buttons in header

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in /api/agent-commands/create endpoint - was returning _id field which caused JSON serialization error
Agent Details page correctly fetches data from multiple endpoints in parallel
Quick Actions create commands with proper parameters and queue them for approval
Download endpoints correctly serve Python scripts with proper Content-Disposition headers
seed_data_creation: Commands created during testing via Quick Actions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent Details page at /agent-commands/{agentId} fully functional. Quick Actions (Full Scan, Collect Forensics, Update Agent, Restart Service) create commands that appear in pending list. Download dropdown on Agents page has Advanced Agent and Defender Installer options. WebSocket agent (7b7dcf5da4fa8e17) registered and visible in Agent Commands page. Fixed ObjectId serialization bug in command creation endpoint.

mongodb_objectid_fix.issue: Command creation returned MongoDB _id field causing JSON serialization error
mongodb_objectid_fix.fix: Added command.pop('_id', None) before returning response and used command.copy() for in-memory storage
